The ''' ''Ravager'' ''' was a [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] serving the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It was part of the [[Rachuk sector/Legends|Rachuk sector]] fleet under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Devlia]] and was sometimes paired with the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|Carrack Cruiser]] ''[[Expeditious]]''.

On a mission with the ''Expeditious'' to collect [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent [[Kirtan Loor]] at [[Vladet]], the pair of ships emerged from hyperspace just as [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[Defender Wing]] were finishing [[Defense of Vladet|their attack]] on Admiral Devlia's [[Grand Isle]] base. ''Ravager'' moved in to engage the [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]]. Both [[Champion Squadron]] and [[Guardian Squadron]], as well most of Rogue Squadron, were trying to regain altitude after their ground-attack run, and ''Ravager'' neatly caught them in a trap.

In a daring maneuver, [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] had the Y-wings of [[Warden Squadron]] he was flying with target his ship instead of closing with the ''Ravager'' and coming under her guns. Crucial timing allowed Horn to put the ''Ravager'' between him and the torpedoes; though some survivors were rescued by Imperial Intelligence, the ship was sucked down into the planet's gravity well and destroyed.
